---
title: "Cawnpore</i"
---

## Cawnpore</i

**Author:** George Otto Trevelyan
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** London: Macmillan

### Notes

CMY reviewed this in both <i>Macmillan\'s Magazine</i> and the <i>Literary Churchman</i>, but did not mention it in <i>MP</i>, perhaps because she considered the subject unsuitable for the young.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
